text:
net guarded_curation_choice "Choose the speak or silent curation branch with complementary guards"

(curation_token) -curation-> [speak_gate_speak] -speak_req-> (speak_request)
(curation_token) -curation-> [speak_gate_skip] -utterance-> (final_utterance)

[speak_gate_speak] handler "request_speak@curate"
[speak_gate_speak] guard "speak_eligible@curate"

[speak_gate_skip] handler "skip_speak@curate"
[speak_gate_skip] guard "speak_skip@curate"

marking initial (curation_token) <- $curation
$curation: curation {"should_speak": true}
